raw_result.description: Work management and workflow platform with a GraphQL API for boards, items, users, and related workspace data.
raw_result.auth_notes: Official authentication docs describe personal API tokens (V2) sent in the Authorization header and OAuth 2.0 for third-party/public apps.
raw_result.gating_reason: Official pricing indicates API calls are not available on Free or Basic plans; Standard is the minimum plan with API access.

api_surface.breadth: Official docs describe a GraphQL API covering boards, groups, items, columns, workspaces, folders, updates, and users, indicating broad platform coverage.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Official docs include a 'Platform MCP for monday.com' overview describing an MCP server for LLM interactions with monday.com resources.

raw_result.blocker: A paid Standard plan or higher is required for API access.
raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Official rate-limit docs describe multiple limits, including complexity budgets up to 10M points/min for personal tokens (1M for free/trial), plus plan-based daily, minute, and concurrency caps.
raw_result.notable_signals: Strong first-party developer docs, explicit auth documentation for both token and OAuth2, official MCP documentation, and detailed plan-based rate-limit guidance.
